word: G762 - ἄσβεστος - ásbestos - as'-bes-tos - Not to be quenched

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Not to be quenched
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4570; not extinguished, that is, (by implication) perpetual: - not to be quenched, unquenchable.
